text: A recipe uses sugar and flour in the ratio 1:3. If you use 6 cups of sugar, how many cups of flour do you need?
generatorSolution: The ratio of sugar to flour is 1:3. This means for every 1 cup of sugar, you need 3 cups of flour. If you use 6 cups of sugar, you multiply both parts of the ratio by 6. So flour = 6 × 3 = 18 cups.
